inflation.label: oil + tariffs
inflation.note: Sees PCE elevated near-term driven by tariffs and Middle East energy prices, with underlying inflation outside imported goods and energy still stable.
inflation.quote: higher tariffs and energy prices has contributed about a  percentage point to that

labor.label: stable / balanced
labor.note: Hard data point to stabilization with unemployment around 4.3 percent, while some soft data suggest gradual slowing.
labor.quote: Much of the hard data points to stabilization, while  some of the soft data suggest continued gradual slowing

stance.label: appropriate / well positioned
stance.note: Judges the current stance well positioned to balance the two-sided risks, with the FOMC holding the funds rate at 3-1/2 to 3-3/4 percent.
stance.quote: current stance of monetary policy is well positioned to balance the risks to  our maximum employment and price st
